subject: Cinyanja
coverageNote: Form directories exist only where teaching-module source PDFs were ingested. Missing forms must resolve as known-gap, not empty objects.

lesson.title: Fotokoza ubwino wa Litilica ya Zolembedwa.
topics: Pali mitundu iwili ya Litilica. Litilica ya Zapakamwa ndi Litilica ya Zolembedwa.
Maguluwa ali ndi nchito zosiyana-siyana. Pali nchito za Litilica ya Zapakamwa
ndi nchito ya Litilica ya Zolembedwa.
